calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-07-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-29-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing on Cross Complaint this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones, Bailiff: R. Guitron.
Steve MacDonald, Esq. and Jethro Busch, Esq. for Plaintiff: Dale Durrett, also present in court, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony, reviewing and considering of the evidence and exhibits presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Charles Medlin; 112 Lundys Lan LLC. aka One Twelve Lundys Lane LLC; 112 Lundys Lane LLC, Inc., a corporation; aka One Twelve Lundys Lane LLC, Inc. a corporation, 112 Lundys Lane LLC, partnership aka One Twelve Lundys Lane LLc partnership; and Charles Medlin as a partner of 112 Lundys Lane LLC partnership aka Charles Medlin as a partner of One Twelve Lundys Lane LLC partnership as follows:
Plaintiff is entitled to recover possession of the property located at 112 Lundys Lane, San Francisco.
Damages $20,851.52
Attorney Fees $25,567.50
Costs $628.00.
Judgment signed in open court.
See details of Judgment in scanned doc.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-25-2008 Continued To May-19-08 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-14-2008 Set For Order To Show Cause On Apr-07-08 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
